'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 31''' was the thirty-first issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[July 31]], [[2002]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Sith/Legends|Sith]] Search for [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]]

*[[General/Legends|General]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers]]
*[[Ric Olié/Legends|Ric Olié]]
*[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]
*[[CD-2 Harvester]] Droid
*[[Carbon-freezing/Legends|Carbon Freezing]]
*[[Ratts Tyerell/Legends|Ratts Tyerell's]] [[Podracing/Legends|Podracer]]
